summary: Pipeline smoke-test output. The scorecard's letter grade and factor navigation orient quickly, but data-heavy views load slowly and the issues list needs prioritization work before it is board-conversation ready.

likes.title: Letter grade orients instantly at the top of My Scorecard
likes.detail: The B/82 grade badge sits top-left of My Scorecard with an immediate 'Create Action Plan' affordance, so posture and next step are visible within one second of page load.
likes.whyItWorks: Board-legible framing with a built-in path to action.
likes.jtbd: Translate technical security posture into board-ready risk narratives

likes.title: Scorecard left rail exposes the full evidence tree
likes.detail: Overview, Score Factors, History, Issues, Compliance, Evidence Locker and Risk Quantification are one click from the scorecard, giving a CISO a predictable mental map of where evidence lives.
likes.whyItWorks: Predictable navigation reduces time-to-evidence during exec prep.
likes.jtbd: Produce defensible evidence for overlapping regulatory regimes

dislikes.title: Scorecard body shows a 'Loading artifacts' spinner for many seconds
dislikes.detail: On My Scorecard the header and grade render immediately but the Company Overview body remained on 'Loading artifacts' well past initial paint, leaving an empty page during a live briefing moment.
dislikes.customerPain: When I screen-share this in an exec meeting the page is blank while it loads.
dislikes.jtbd: Translate technical security posture into board-ready risk narratives
dislikes.firstAction: Instrument p95 time-to-content on scorecard overview and add skeleton states.

dislikes.title: Issues list lacks a 'top score drivers' cut
dislikes.detail: The Issues view lists findings without a visible ranking by score impact, so translating the list into the three fixes that would move the grade requires manual triage.
dislikes.customerPain: I cannot tell which three fixes would actually move my score this quarter.
dislikes.jtbd: Prioritize remediation with a flat headcount using outside-in risk signal
dislikes.firstAction: Prototype a score-impact-ranked view of the issues list.

dislikes.title: Report Center outputs are not audit-committee shaped
dislikes.detail: Report Center offers many export types but no template that matches what an audit committee expects (trend, peer benchmark, dollars-at-risk, remediation SLA table) in one artifact.
dislikes.customerPain: I still rebuild the board deck by hand from screenshots and CSVs.
dislikes.firstAction: Interview five CISO customers about their current board-deck assembly workflow.
